{{Quote|You want us to go to the moon, Nym? It's just a dead rock.|[[Jinkins]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''</ref>}}
'''Khons''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lok/Legends|Lok]]. [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] staged an assault on the planet from this moon.

During the closing stages of the [[Occupation of Karthakk]], the [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]] secured an [[Orbital Defense Cannon]] and set it up on Khons, directed at the [[Nym's Base|Trade Federation refuelling station]] on the planet below. Using this, Nym took back his former base.

{{Moon-stub}}
